title: Overgrown's Origins: Grand Jester (Resources)
description: Enhance your Grand Jester experience with our custom Resource Pack! This essential pack brings the Grand Jester Origin to life with unique item models for the Jester Hat, Marotte, and Patchwork Cloak, and includes translation files!
body:
## 🎨 **Grand Jester Resource Pack: Visual Magic Awaits!** 🎨

Elevate your Grand Jester gameplay with the meticulously crafted Resource Pack! Designed to seamlessly integrate with the Grand Jester Origin, this pack transforms your Minecraft world with stunning visuals and enhanced details.

### 🚀 **Custom Models and Textures:** 🚀

- **Jester Hat**: Experience the vibrant, detailed model that brings the iconic Jester's cap to life.
- **Marotte**: Wield a beautifully rendered scepter, complete with a mocking visage that embodies the spirit of jest.
- **Patchwork Cloak**: Don the detailed cloak, woven from red and yellow wool with golden accents, ensuring every adventurer stands out.

### 🌍 **Multilingual Support:** 🌍

- **Languages**: Dive into the mischief with full support for both **English** and **Spanish** translations. Every quip, jest, and description is carefully translated to capture the essence of the jester's wit in your preferred language.

### 🌟 **Why Install the Grand Jester Resource Pack?** 🌟

This resource pack is **needed** for the Grand Jester Origin to work properly, that's it. So, **Download Now and Transform Your World with the Grand Jester Resource Pack!**
---
All of the custom items were modeled and textured by [Prismatic Pinky](https://prismaticpinky.carrd.co/) whom I commissioned to make, genuinely recommend them, they are extremely talented!!!
